SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractConstraintViolationHttpStatusCodeConditionalConverter<T>
Base class for conditional converters from ConstraintViolation to HttpStatusCode.
AuthentikClientConnectionDetails
Represents the connection details for the Authentik client.
AuthentikClientConnectionDetailsProperties
Implementation of AuthentikClientConnectionDetails that holds the connection details for the Authentik client based on properties.
AuthentikClientProperties
Properties for configuring the Authentik client.
AuthentikCustomHeaders
Utility class for Authentik custom headers.
AuthentikGroup
Represents an Authentik group.
AuthentikPaginated<T>
Represents a paginated response from Authentik.
AuthentikPagination
Represents pagination information for Authentik API responses.
AuthentikProxiedAuthentication
Represents an authentication object for Authentik proxied authentication.
AuthentikProxiedAuthenticationException
Exception for missing or invalid Authentik proxied authentication headers.
AuthentikProxiedAuthenticationImpersonationFilter
A filter that impersonates a user by overriding the "X-Authentik-Username" header.
AuthentikRestClient
Client for interacting with Authentik's REST API.
AuthentikUser
Represents an Authentik user.
Command<I,O>
Marker interface for commands in the application.
CommandException
Exception that wraps a command request and an optional underlying cause.
CommandExecutor
Interface for executing commands in the domain.
CommandHandler<C,I,O>
Interface for command handlers in the application.
CommandMetadataCombiner
Functional interface that serves as a combiner for merging metadata in the context of commands.
CommandMetadataFactory
Factory interface for creating command metadata.
CommandRequest<C,I,O>
A request for a command to be executed, containing the command itself, the input data, and any metadata.
CommandService
Service for executing commands in the application.
ConditionalOnNonBlankProperty
This annotation can be used to conditionally enable a bean based on the presence of a non-blank property.
ConstraintError
Represents an error related to a constraint violation.
ConstraintErrorReport
Represents a report of constraint validation errors.
DelegatingResolutionService<I,O>
A ResolutionService implementation that delegates the resolution to a list of Resolvers.
DeleteScraperOwnedProfileBatchCommand
Command to delete a batch of scraper-owned profiles.
DeleteScraperOwnedProfileCommand
Command to delete a scraper-owned profile.
DeleteScraperOwnedSpecificationBatchCommand
Command for deleting a batch of owned scraper specifications using a filter.
DeleteScraperOwnedSpecificationCommand
Command to delete a scraper-owned specification using a filter.
DeleteScraperOwnedSpecificationEntityBatchCommand
Command to delete a batch of scraper-owned specification entities.
DeleteScraperOwnedSpecificationEntityCommand
Command to delete a single scraper-owned specification entity.
DeleteScraperOwnedStrategyBatchCommand
Command to delete a batch of scraper-owned strategies.
DeleteScraperOwnedStrategyCommand
Command to delete a scraper-owned strategy.
DeleteScraperSpecificationBatchCommand
Command for deleting a batch of scraper specifications by their names.
DeleteScraperSpecificationCommand
Command for deleting a single scraper specification by name.
EntityConflictException
Exception thrown when an entity cannot be deleted because it is referenced by another entity.
EntityConflictExceptionReportConverter
Converts an EntityConflictException into an ErrorReport representation.
EntityException
Base class for exceptions related to entity operations in the persistence layer.
EntityNotFoundException
Exception thrown when an entity is not found in the database.
EntityNotFoundExceptionReportConverter
Converts an EntityNotFoundException into an ErrorReport representation.
EntityReferrer<E>
Represents a reference to an entity of type E.
EntityRetriever<R,E>
A service that retrieves an entity based on a given referrer.
EntityService
Service for managing entities.
ErrorReport
Represents a general structure for error reporting.
FindAuthentikUserCommand
Command to find an Authentik user.
FindScraperOwnedProfileBatchCommand
Command for finding a batch of scraper owned profiles.
FindScraperOwnedProfileCommand
Command for finding a scraper owned profile.
FindScraperOwnedProfileEntityBatchCommand
Command to find a batch of scraper-owned profile entities.
FindScraperOwnedProfileEntityCommand
Command to find a scraper-owned profile entity.
FindScraperOwnedSpecificationBatchCommand
Command to find a batch of scraper-owned specifications using a filter.
FindScraperOwnedSpecificationCommand
Command to find a scraper-owned specification using a filter.
FindScraperOwnedSpecificationEntityBatchCommand
Command to find a batch of scraper-owned specification entities using a filter.
FindScraperOwnedSpecificationEntityCommand
Command to find a single scraper-owned specification entity using a filter.
FindScraperOwnedStrategyBatchCommand
Command to find a batch of scraper-owned strategies.
FindScraperOwnedStrategyCommand
Command to find a scraper-owned strategy.
FindScraperOwnedStrategyEntityBatchCommand
Command to find a batch of scraper-owned strategy entities using lazy relationships.
FindScraperOwnedStrategyEntityCommand
Command to find a scraper-owned strategy entity.
FindScraperSpecificationBatchCommand
Command for retrieving a batch of scraper specifications by their names.
FindScraperSpecificationCommand
Command for retrieving a single scraper specification by name.
FuzzyScorer
Utility class for calculating fuzzy scores between strings.
HttpStatusEntryPoint
An authentication entry point that sends a specified HTTP status code when authentication is required.
IterableConverters
Utility class for converting iterables to other types.
IteratorConverters
Utility class for converting an Iterator to an Enumeration.
MessageErrorReport
Represents an error report containing an HTTP status code and a message body.
NonBlankPropertyCondition
A condition that checks if a specific property is defined and not blank.
ProxiedAuthenticationConverter
Interface for converting HTTP requests into authentication objects.
ProxiedAuthenticationFilterConfigurerAdapter
Configures the authentication filter for proxied authentication.
ProxiedAuthenticationImpersonationFilter
Interface for a filter that handles impersonation in proxied authentication scenarios.
ProxiedAuthenticationImpersonationFilterConfigurerAdapter
Configures the ProxiedAuthenticationImpersonationFilter to be added before the AuthenticationFilter in the security filter chain.
ProxiedAuthenticationSuccessHandler
Handles successful authentication events.
RequireEntity
Indicates that the annotated entity must be present or absent in the database.
ResolutionException
Exception thrown when no resolvable is found for a given input.
ResolutionService<I,O>
A service that resolves an input of type I to an output of type O.
ResolvableTypes
Utility class for working with Spring's ResolvableType.
Resolver<I,O>
A resolver that attempts to resolve an input of type I to an output of type O.
Result<T,E>
Represents a result of an operation that can either succeed with a value of type T or fail with an error of type E.
Result.Failure<T,E>
Represents a failed result containing an error of type E.
Result.Success<T,E>
Represents a successful result containing a value of type T.
SaveScraperOwnedProfileCommand
Command for saving a scraper owned profile.
SaveScraperOwnedProfileCommand.Handler
Handler for SaveScraperOwnedProfileCommand.
SaveScraperOwnedSpecificationCommand
Command to save a scraper-owned specification.
SaveScraperOwnedSpecificationCommand.Handler
Handler for SaveScraperOwnedSpecificationCommand.
SaveScraperOwnedStrategyCommand
Command to save a scraper-owned strategy.
SaveScraperOwnedStrategyCommand.Handler
Handler for SaveScraperOwnedStrategyCommand.
SaveScraperSpecificationCommand
Command for saving a scraper specification.
ScraperCommand
Command to scrape data using a request.
ScraperNamedProfile
Represents a named scraper profile.
ScraperNamedStrategy
Represents a named scraper strategy.
ScraperNamelessProfile
Represents a nameless scraper profile.
ScraperNamelessProfileSpecificationCompliantValidator
Validator to ensure that a ScraperNamelessProfile complies with its associated ScraperSpecification.
ScraperOwnedCommand
Command to scrape data using a query.
ScraperOwnedCommand.Handler
Handler for ScraperOwnedCommand.
ScraperOwnedProfile
Represents a scraper profile owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedProfileBatchByReferenceOwnerAndReferenceNameBatchFilter
Filter for scraper owned profile batches by reference owner and reference name.
ScraperOwnedProfileBatchByReferenceOwnerFilter
Filter for scraper owned profile batches.
ScraperOwnedProfileBatchDeletedEvent
Event that is published when a batch of scraper-owned profiles is deleted.
ScraperOwnedProfileBatchFilter
Sealed interface for batch filters on scraper-owned profiles.
ScraperOwnedProfileBatchReference
Reference to a batch of owned profiles.
ScraperOwnedProfileByReferrerFilter
Filter for scraper owned profiles.
ScraperOwnedProfileDeletedEvent
Event that is published when a scraper-owned profile is deleted.
ScraperOwnedProfileEntity
Represents a scraper profile owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedProfileFilter
Sealed interface for filters on scraper-owned profiles.
ScraperOwnedProfileReference
Represents a reference to a scraper profile owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedProfileReferrer
Represents a reference to a scraper profile owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedProfileRepository
Repository interface for managing scraper-owned profiles.
ScraperOwnedRequest
Request to scrape a website with specific strategies and search term.
ScraperOwnedSpecification
Represents a scraper specification owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationAction
Actions that can be performed on a scraper specification owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationActionRequest
Request model for actions on scraper-owned specifications.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationBatchByQueryAndOwnerAndIgnoreCaseAndStrictModeEnabledFilter
Filter for querying batches of scraper specifications by query, owner, case sensitivity, and strict mode.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationBatchByReferenceAndStatusFilter
Filter for querying batches of scraper specifications by reference and status.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationBatchByReferenceBatchAndStatusFilter
Filter for querying batches of scraper specifications by reference batch and status.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationBatchByReferenceOwnerAndStatusNotFilter
Filter for querying batches of scraper specifications by reference owner and status.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationBatchFilter
Sealed interface for batch filters on scraper-owned specifications.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationByReferenceAndStatusNotFilter
Filter for querying batches of scraper specifications by reference and status.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationEntity
Entity representing a scraper specification owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationFilter
Sealed interface for filters on scraper-owned specifications.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationReference
Reference to a scraper specification owned by a specific user.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationRepository
Repository for accessing and managing scraper specification entities owned by users.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationStatus
Enumeration of possible statuses for a scraper-owned specification.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationStatusTransitionException
Exception thrown when an invalid status transition is attempted on a scraper-owned specification.
ScraperOwnedSpecificationStatusTransitionExceptionReportConverter
Converts a ScraperOwnedSpecificationStatusTransitionException into an ErrorReport.
ScraperOwnedStrategy
Represents a scraper strategy owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedStrategyBatchByReferenceOwnerAndReferenceNameBatchFilter
Filter for a batch of scraper-owned strategies based on the owner and a list of names.
ScraperOwnedStrategyBatchByReferenceOwnerFilter
Filter for scraper owned strategy batches.
ScraperOwnedStrategyBatchFilter
Sealed interface for scraper owned strategy batch filters.
ScraperOwnedStrategyByReferrerFilter
Filter for scraper owned strategies by referrer.
ScraperOwnedStrategyEntity
Entity representing a scraper strategy owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedStrategyEntity.LazyRelationship
Enum representing the lazy loading relationships for the strategy entity.
ScraperOwnedStrategyFilter
Sealed interface for scraper owned strategy filters.
ScraperOwnedStrategyReference
Represents a reference to a scraper strategy owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedStrategyReferrer
Represents a reference to a scraper strategy owned by a user.
ScraperOwnedStrategyRepository
Repository interface for managing scraper-owned strategies.
ScraperPartialProfile
Represents a partial profile for a scraper, which includes the specification reference and input parameters.
ScraperQuery
Represents a query for scraping data.
ScraperSpecificationCompliant
Validation annotation to ensure that an object holding a specification complies with it.
ScraperSpecificationRequirementBatch
A batch of scraper specification requirements.
ScraperUnownedProfile
Represents a scraper profile that is not owned by a user.
ScraperUnownedStrategy
Represents a scraper strategy that is not owned by a user.
TypeResolver<O>
A resolver that resolves an input object to an output object based on the type of the input object.
UniqueIdentifierProvider
Interface for providing a unique identifier.
UpdateScraperOwnedProfileCommand
Command for updating a scraper owned profile.
UpdateScraperOwnedProfileCommand.Handler
Handler for UpdateScraperOwnedProfileCommand.
UpdateScraperOwnedSpecificationEntityStatusCommand
Command to update the status of a scraper-owned specification entity.
UpdateScraperOwnedStrategyCommand
Command to update a scraper-owned strategy.
UpdateScraperOwnedStrategyCommand.Handler
Handler for UpdateScraperOwnedStrategyCommand.
UpdateScraperOwnedStrategyCommand.Operation
Enum representing the possible operations for updating a scraper-owned strategy.
User
User information model.
UserRole
Enumeration of user roles.
UserRoleNames
Utility class for user role names.
UserRoleProperties
Configuration properties for user roles in Spring Security.
WebscoutClient
Client for interacting with the Webscout REST API for scraping data.
WebscoutClientConnectionDetails
Defines the connection details required for the Webscout client.
WebscoutClientConnectionDetailsProperties
Implementation of WebscoutClientConnectionDetails using application properties.
WebscoutClientProperties
Configuration properties for the Webscout client.
WebscoutRestClient
Client for interacting with the Webscout REST API for scraper specifications.
